markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Define scope and pricing for a combined Superhuman/Grammarly proposal.](https://fathom.video/share/LQz4WET3P8yqqSFTUyCKEAhxwFmfWCxG?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Proposal:** A $12k/mo editorial-only contract, mirroring the Superhuman deal, to secure the renewal and expand to Grammarly.](https://fathom.video/share/LQz4WET3P8yqqSFTUyCKEAhxwFmfWCxG?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
  - [**Strategy:** Lead with editorial to build trust and use "Lovable FOMO" (referencing our successful Lovable AI project) to anchor the price and scope.](https://fathom.video/share/LQz4WET3P8yqqSFTUyCKEAhxwFmfWCxG?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [**Programmatic Deferral:** Defer programmatic content (e.g., cover letter generators) until we understand their tools' API/data integration capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/LQz4WET3P8yqqSFTUyCKEAhxwFmfWCxG?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**Preparation:** Marcel will create a mini-strategy deck with a content gap analysis and competitor research (e.g., Copy.ai) to justify the proposed scope.](https://fathom.video/share/LQz4WET3P8yqqSFTUyCKEAhxwFmfWCxG?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)

## Topics

### Client Context & Goals

  - [**Superhuman:** Current contract is $12k/mo for 100k words/mo (\~10 articles/week), renewing Feb 18.](https://fathom.video/share/LQz4WET3P8yqqSFTUyCKEAhxwFmfWCxG?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [**Grammarly:** Wants to expand content efforts, providing specific use cases:](https://fathom.video/share/LQz4WET3P8yqqSFTUyCKEAhxwFmfWCxG?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
      - [**Editorial:** "How to revise your writing," "What is AGI?"](https://fathom.video/share/LQz4WET3P8yqqSFTUyCKEAhxwFmfWCxG?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
      - [**Programmatic:** "Guide to commonly confused words" (dictionary-style pages).](https://fathom.video/share/LQz4WET3P8yqqSFTUyCKEAhxwFmfWCxG?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [**Combined Goal:** Secure a single contract for both teams, with separate budgets.](https://fathom.video/share/LQz4WET3P8yqqSFTUyCKEAhxwFmfWCxG?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)

### Proposed Solution: Editorial-First Approach

  - [**Price:** $12k/mo, matching the Superhuman contract to anchor the deal.](https://fathom.video/share/LQz4WET3P8yqqSFTUyCKEAhxwFmfWCxG?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
  - [**Scope:** Editorial-only, with a flexible mix of net-new articles and targeted refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/LQz4WET3P8yqqSFTUyCKEAhxwFmfWCxG?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This structure is a win-win: it secures the renewal and addresses Joe's feedback that the current 10 articles/week commitment is a high volume.](https://fathom.video/share/LQz4WET3P8yqqSFTUyCKEAhxwFmfWCxG?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [**Programmatic Content:** Defer until later.](https://fathom.video/share/LQz4WET3P8yqqSFTUyCKEAhxwFmfWCxG?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Their tools appear to be custom dev builds, and we lack a clear path for API or data integration—a prerequisite for scalable programmatic work.](https://fathom.video/share/LQz4WET3P8yqqSFTUyCKEAhxwFmfWCxG?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [**Alternative:** Offer a $25k/mo bundle (editorial + programmatic) but actively discourage it, as it's premature without a clear integration strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/LQz4WET3P8yqqSFTUyCKEAhxwFmfWCxG?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Supporting Rationale: "Lovable FOMO"

  - [**Tactic:** Leverage our success with Lovable AI as a proof point.](https://fathom.video/share/LQz4WET3P8yqqSFTUyCKEAhxwFmfWCxG?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [**Method:** Present a mini-strategy deck modeled on the Lovable proposal.](https://fathom.video/share/LQz4WET3P8yqqSFTUyCKEAhxwFmfWCxG?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
      - [**Content:** A content gap analysis and competitor research (e.g., Copy.ai) to identify high-traffic clusters and justify our proposed scope.](https://fathom.video/share/LQz4WET3P8yqqSFTUyCKEAhxwFmfWCxG?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Marcel:**](https://fathom.video/share/LQz4WET3P8yqqSFTUyCKEAhxwFmfWCxG?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
      - [Create a mini-strategy deck for the Wednesday meeting, modeled on the Lovable AI proposal.](https://fathom.video/share/LQz4WET3P8yqqSFTUyCKEAhxwFmfWCxG?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
      - [Conduct competitor research (e.g., Copy.ai) to inform the content gap analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/LQz4WET3P8yqqSFTUyCKEAhxwFmfWCxG?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/LQz4WET3P8yqqSFTUyCKEAhxwFmfWCxG?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
      - [Prepare for the Wednesday meeting using the defined scope and pricing strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/LQz4WET3P8yqqSFTUyCKEAhxwFmfWCxG?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)
